name: DevSecOps Lab
postCreateCommand: pip install -r requirements-dev.txt && mkdir -p $HOME/.local/bin && curl -sSfL https://github.com/gitleaks/gitleaks/releases/download/v8.18.4/gitleaks_8.18.4_linux_x64.tar.gz -o /tmp/gl.tar.gz && tar -xzf /tmp/gl.tar.gz -C $HOME/.local/bin gitleaks && pre-commit install
